objectives.text: Oh, I am glad you stopped by! One of our guards came to me with a bit of a dilemma - they need to make a trip to a nearby village to visit family, but they have a patrol shift tonight and do not want to leave the colony unprotected. I told them I could craft a Teleport Scroll to make the trip quick enough that they could be back in time. I just need a few materials - could you help?

options.answer: Of course! What do you need?

result.text: Wonderful! Just three sheets of paper and a compass - I already have the Build Tool ready here. Simple enough! Once I have those I can have the scroll finished in no time.

options.answer: I will get those for you right away!
Sorry, I am a bit busy right now.

objectives.text: Perfect! The scroll is already done - the guard stopped by a little while ago so I sent it along with them straight away. They are out on the paths somewhere. Why don't you go say hello? I am sure they would appreciate knowing you helped make this possible!

options.answer: Happy to! I will go find them.

objectives.text: Oh! You must be the one who helped the enchanter gather those materials! I heard all about it. I actually have some great news - one of the other guards offered to cover my shift so I could stay the night after all! I am still taking the scroll just in case. My mother absolutely insisted I bring this back for whoever helped. She baked it fresh this morning!

options.answer: Give your family my best! Safe travels!
That is very kind! Tell her it smells wonderful.

result.text: Ha! I will pass that along. She will be so pleased. Now go on - and thank you again, truly. It means a lot that people here look out for one another.

options.answer: That is what a good colony is all about!
